eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Los Angeles; San Bernardino, CA; at 08:41 PM ON FEB 9, 2026 Effective until 10:41 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AN AMBER ALERT IS BEING ISSUED BY THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL ON BEHALF OF THE CHINO HILLS POLICE DEPARTMENT.

ON FEBRUARY 9, 2026, AT 4 00 PM, JAYCEON BROWNER WAS ABDUCTED FROM CHINO HILLS, CALIFORNIA. JAYCEON BROWNER IS A 10 YEAR OLD BLACK MALE, WITH BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES.

SECOND VICTIM, KARTIER BROWNER IS A 9 YEAR OLD BLACK FEMALE, WITH BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES.

THIRD VICTIM, EMANI BROWNER IS A 5 YEAR OLD BLACK FEMALE, WITH BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES.

THE SUSPECT, JOSEPH BROWNER, IS A 31 YEAR OLD BLACK MALE, STANDING 5 FEET 8 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING 200 POUNDS WITH BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES.

THE SUSPECT WAS LAST SEEN DRIVING A 2025 BLACK KIA NIRO, WITH CALIFORNIA LICENSE PLATE NUMBER 9 V W P 9 3 9.

IF SEEN CALL 9 1 1
